ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., code, document) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "ref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "refid_src" INTEGER /* ID of the source file or line */,
  "refid_dst" INTEGER /* ID of the destination file or line */,
  "id_file" INTEGER /* ID of the file containing the reference */,
  "line" INTEGER /* Line number in the file */,
  "column" INTEGER /* Column number in the file */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the reference was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reference */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of reference (e.g., function call, variable usage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_id_file FOREIGN KEY ("id_file") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_version_by FOREIGN KEY ("version_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_tags" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was added */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id", "tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_tags" (
  "ref_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reference */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was added */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ref_id", "tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reference_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
